channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Louisiana House Approves Map Eliminating Racially Drawn District
item.description: The GOP-controlled Louisiana House passed a new congressional map on Thursday, which Republicans argue complies with a Supreme Court ruling while removing one...

item.title: Justice Department Sues Four Liberal States Over License Plate Policies That Hinder Federal Authorities
Federal Judge Dismisses White House Challenge to Boston's Sanctuary Immigration Law
item.description: A federal judge dismissed a lawsuit filed by the Trump administration challenging a Boston ordinance that limits police cooperation with federal immigration...

item.title: Jeff Bezos Launch Vehicle Explodes in Massive Fireball; Elon Musk Remarks: 'Rockets Are Hard'
